subject: A massive stone-and-rubble golem standing in a windswept grassy plain, its mouth open in a wide howl, with one massive arm raised mid-motion
description: A hulking humanoid construct made of jagged grey stone and broken masonry stands at the center of a wide green plain, its body composed of slabs and chunks of weathered rock fitted together into a roughly anthropomorphic shape. Its head is tilted back and its jagged mouth gapes open as if mid-howl or roar. One enormous arm is raised and extended, the other crossed at its torso. Faint dust or smaller debris seems to trail from its body. The grassy field stretches into the distance under a pale, overcast sky, with low rolling hills and what appears to be scattered ruins or stones in the mid-ground. The palette is dominated by muted greys, mossy greens, and washed-out sky tones, giving the image a desolate, lonely quality.
foreground: stone golem with raised arm, mouth open mid-howl
background: rolling grassy plains under overcast pale sky with distant hills and faint ruins
emotion: anguished, mournful — open-mouthed howl reads as grief or warning rather than aggression
